name: textarea
source_code: // elements/textarea.html
visual_summary: A textarea is a multi-line input field where users can type a block of text. It is typically used in forms where users need to enter a paragraph of text, such as a message or description. The textarea is a rectangular box with a resize handle in the bottom-right corner.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics: Name: textarea Description: A textarea is a multi-line input field where users can type a block of text. It is typically used in forms where users need to enter a paragraph of text, such as a message or description. The textarea is a rectangular box with a resize handle in the bottom-right corner. Style: rounded, boxed Interactions: Tags: input, form Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations. Reference implementation (adapt don't copy): // elements/textarea.html
